channel.title: Movie on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Movie on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: The Empire Shorts Back
item.description: In a galaxy far, far away… Dippy faces a terrible truth on Cloud Exchange. Moony is his father. The market has never been more volatile.

item.title: Dungeon Crawler Dippy
item.description: The universe collapsed into a nine-floor dungeon. 4.2 billion viewers are watching. Dippy’s going to need a bigger stop-loss.

item.title: The Moonyfather
item.description: A Godfather rip-off where Moony runs a crime family of underperforming value stocks, and Dippy makes an offer he can’t refuse.
